Text.Page:
The Channelworks is a series of cisterns and aqueducts that supplies water for the western Veritas District. It is maintained by a cadre of automatons, which require very little supervision.

Recently, a violent cyclops named Kerkion found its way into the Channelworks, and has been causing damage faster than the automatons can repair it.

If you are willing to enter the Channelworks and eliminate Kerkion—along with any other hazards you find—you would be well rewarded.

Large and small impediments eliminated. Commencing repairs.

Dispensing reward.
